question.label: Team bar mismatch
question.name: When you say 'team bar' — what feels unclear about it?
question.description: Drills into the specific source of his uncertainty about standards before moving on.

answer: Feedback has helped, though I still miss consistency under time pressure.

assessment.note: He says feedback helped but he still cannot hold the quality bar consistently under time pressure, which is a mild ongoing clarity gap.

new_queue.label: Time pressure consistency
new_queue.name: Under time pressure, what specifically starts to slip in your work?

new_queue.label: Recent example
new_queue.name: Can you walk me through one piece of recent work that you think met the bar?

new_queue.label: Quality bar
new_queue.name: What made that piece feel up to standard to you?

new_queue.label: Expectation mismatch
new_queue.name: Where do your standards for good work differ from mine right now?

new_queue.label: Feedback change
new_queue.name: What did you change in your process after the last round of feedback?

new_queue.label: Blocked practice
new_queue.name: What part of your craft feels hardest to improve at the moment?

new_queue.label: Next step
new_queue.name: What is the first concrete change you want to make before we meet again?

history.answer_excerpt: I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
Feedback has helped, though I still miss consistency under time pressure.
